prompt: A hyper-detailed Japanese pachinko machine front view designed as a surreal contemporary-art parody, glossy black and metallic purple body with intense magenta-violet LED illumination, sparkling chrome trim, jewel-like plastic molding, and multiple pink paw-print emblems embedded throughout the frame. The central display features a dramatic middle-aged Japanese woman with short curly auburn-brown hair, wearing a dark kimono, pointing directly toward the viewer in a confrontational heroic pose against a cosmic purple lightning-and-nebula background. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, and 3 additional smaller portraits of the same woman also appear around the machine with the same blurred-face treatment, for a total of 4 blurred human portraits. Include 3 plush panda heads tucked into the machine layout along the left and right sides. At the very top, large glittering title text reads "CR 岡安モフモフ" with a smaller subtitle beneath it reading "もふもふは、正義。" On the left of the center screen, add the phrase "今日もモフって生きていく。" Across the woman’s chest area, place a black brushstroke label with gold lettering reading "岡安モフセフ". On the right side, create a bright bonus panel with a paw icon and the words "モフモフ RUSH". Near the lower center, add a circular button-like emblem reading "モフモフ CHANCE". At the bottom center, create a large glowing control button labeled "モフモフ" with a pink paw icon. In the lower right display area, add a smaller inset image of the same pointing woman and handwritten-style text reading "もふるか もふられるか…" The overall mood should feel absurd, gaudy, overdesigned, kitschy, and funny, like a fake pachinko machine celebrating fluffy animals and melodramatic spectacle, rendered as a high-resolution product-style front-facing photograph with sharp reflections, saturated purple highlights, and dense decorative detail.
translatedPrompt: 一张超高细节的日式柏青哥机正面视图，设计为超现实的当代艺术恶搞风格，采用亮面黑色与金属紫色机身，配以强烈的品红-紫色 LED 照明、闪亮的镀铬饰条、珠宝般的塑料模具，机身各处嵌入了多个粉色爪印徽章。中央显示屏呈现了一位中年日本女性，她留着深红棕色短卷发，身穿深色和服，以一种充满对抗性的英雄姿势直指观众，背景为宇宙紫色的闪电与星云。她的面部被刻意用柔和的矩形模糊处理，机身周围还出现了 3 个同样女性的小型肖像，且均采用了相同的面部模糊处理，总计 4 个模糊人像。在机身左右两侧布局中嵌入 3 个毛绒熊猫头。在顶部，醒目的闪光标题文字写着“CR 岡安モフモフ”，下方配有较小的副标题“もふもふは、正義。”。在中央屏幕左侧，添加短语“今日もモフって生きていく。”。在女性胸部区域，放置一个带有金色字样的黑色笔触标签，写着“岡安モフセフ”。在右侧，创建一个带有爪子图标的明亮奖励面板，写着“モフモフ RUSH”。在下方中央，添加一个圆形按钮状徽章，写着“モフモフ CHANCE”。在底部中心，创建一个带有粉色爪子图标的大型发光控制按钮，标签为“モフモフ”。在右下方的显示区域，添加一张该女性指点动作的小型嵌入图像，以及手写风格的文字“もふるか もふられるか…”。整体氛围应显得荒诞、俗气、过度设计、媚俗且滑稽，如同庆祝毛茸茸动物与夸张奇观的虚构柏青哥机，呈现为高分辨率的产品级正面摄影效果，具有锐利的反射、饱和的紫色高光和密集的装饰细节。

breakdown.creativeCore: 荒诞的紫色 Mofumofu 柏青哥机：此提示词可生成一张正面的恶搞柏青哥机图像，包含炫目的日文文本、熊猫元素、模糊的人像以及俗气的紫色街机灯光，适用于讽刺艺术或新奇海报。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: front-facing]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
